title: Contact | Cysylltwch Â Ni - Jessica Morden MP
text_excerpt: Contact | Cysylltwch Â Ni - Jessica Morden MP Skip to main content Jessica Morden MP Labour MP for Newport East Join Get Involved Donate CONTACT ME | CYSYLLTWCH Â FI ABOUT | AMDANAF NEWS | NEWYDDION More Menu Contact | Cysylltwch Â Ni You can get in touch with me in the following ways: By phone: Call 01633 841725. The office is open from 9am to 4pm. Please feel free to leave a message outside of these hours. By email: If you’re a Newport East constituent, you can email me at jessica.morden.mp@parliament.uk or you can get in touch by completing my contact form here. By letter: If you’d like to send me a letter, the address you need is: Jessica Morden MP Clarence House, Clarence Place, Newport NP19 7AA Jessica Morden MP Contact details Jessica Morden MP, Clarence House, Clarence Place, Chepstow Road, Newport, NP19 7AA Jessica Morden MP, Clarence House, Clarence Place, Chepstow Road, Newport, NP19 7AA '> View on Google Maps Email: jessica.morden.mp@parliament.uk Further details This website is, and always has been, personally paid for by Jessica Morden. Promoted by Deb Davies on behalf of Jessica Morden, Ringland Labour Club, Ringland Circle, Newport, NP19 9PS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
